title: Week 40 '07
content:
Oh my god! It really became weekly!

Anyway, what did I do during the past week.

[ 5 minutes has passed ]

I can't remember. --"

[ Came back from the coffee table ]

Still can't remember what I did on Monday.

Okay .. Put up one almost finish website (still waiting for more photos and content from the client) and a really quick sample website to show another client that we can "follow the guideline". That's most of Monday and Tuesday and half of Wednesday, I believe.

Thursday is pretty much .. doing nothing.

And Friday, I cancelled one project and spent the afternoon at Paragon.

Wow ... it does end smoothly. :D

God Bless ...
